title: Login System
body:
[Backup System mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/backupmod)

[Kovai Hosting ](https://discord.gg/YuCwysPkns**)
![kovai](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8edf868eb114268f1e12d1fe0b5bff95f485f3f0.jpeg)

🔐 Login System – Secure Your Server!

Login System is a simple yet powerful mod that adds a registration and login system for offline-mode Minecraft servers.
It ensures players must authenticate before playing, preventing impersonation and unauthorized access.

✨ Features

Player Authentication
Players must /register and /login before interacting with the server.

Auto-Kick & Restrictions
Unauthenticated players cannot move or interact until they log in.

Configurable Settings
Fully customizable via config/loginsystem.properties (timeout, messages, database options, waiting area coordinates, etc.).

Waiting Area & Position Restore

Saves the player’s original position when joining.

Teleports them to a configurable waiting area.

Restores their position after successful login/registration.

Inventory Hiding & Blindness
Unauthenticated players have their inventory hidden and a blindness effect applied.

Double Login Prevention
Blocks duplicate connections with the same UUID (disconnects the second session).

Admin Commands

/loadmin info <player> → View stored password info.

/loadmin delete <player> → Delete a stored password.

🔧 How to Use

Install the Mod

Download the .jar and place it into your server’s mods/ folder.

Configure Settings

Open: config/loginsystem.properties

Each option is documented with comments for easy setup.

Player Commands

/register <password> <confirmPassword>

/login <password>

/changepassword <oldPassword> <newPassword>

Admin Commands

/loadmin info <player>

/loadmin delete <player>

📥 Installation

Mod Loader: Forge

Minecraft Version: 1.20+

Dependencies: None (latest versions only)

💖 Support

If you enjoy the mod, consider supporting me — donations help me keep developing 🚀
🔗 GitHub
